files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 8e2e80c..1c2dc65 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -124,2 +124,9 @@ Day 119 / Week 17 observations:
 - Support sentiment improved after the SLA post, but new social posts still mention critical-bug radio silence and support handoffs. S2 issue age is acceptable, but open issue count is near 1,000.
 - Week 17 adjustment: hold acquisition/pricing/capacity steady, increase support spend again, and post about accuracy/evaluation work while tier-2 R&D is in progress.
+
+Day 126 / Week 18 observations:
+- Cash rose to $731k. Weekly subscription payments were $537k against about $284k in operating costs.
+- S2 content stayed highly profitable: 1,543 paid content subscribers from 4,301 leads, including 519 B and 913 C.
+- Daily usage peaked at 2.17M, close to tier-3's 2.5M limit. Capacity should move to tier 4 before the next growth step creates overload.
+- Tier-2 R&D is still in progress. Competitor quality posts strengthened again, and users are asking for accuracy timelines/benchmarks.
+- Week 18 adjustment: start tier-3 R&D, upgrade capacity to tier 4, keep the proven S2 growth/support settings stable, and post a benchmark/beta-track commitment.
